_meta.purpose: Phase 0 holdout — 4 fixtures NOT seen by Phase 1 implementation. Per PLAN-071 §4.1 R-CR3 + R-CR6, Owner curates labels; CEO does not see them until Phase 1 acceptance run. Acceptance threshold: ≥3/4 holdout classify correctly.
_meta.anti_circularity: These are deliberately authored to probe edge cases not over-fit to train set
